LongParameterList:Interpolation.kt$Interpolation$( value: Float, originalMin: Float, originalMax: Float, newMin: Float, newMax: Float, shouldClamp: Boolean = false )

LongParameterList:LeastSquaresOptimizer.kt$LeastSquaresOptimizer$( points: List<List<Float>>, errors: List<Float>, maxIterations: Int = 100, maxAllowedStep: Float = 500f, dampingFactor: Float = 0.1f, tolerance: Float = 0.0001f, initialValue: List<Float>? = null, distanceFn: (point: List<Float>, guess: List<Float>) -> Float = { a, b -> Geometry.euclideanDistance(a, b) }, weightingFn: (index: Int, point: List<Float>, error: Float) -> Float = { index, point, error -> 1f }, jacobianFn: (index: Int, point: List<Float>, guess: List<Float>) -> List<Float> = { index, point, guess -> val distance = distanceFn(point, guess) point.mapIndexed { j, value -> (guess[j] - value) / distance * weightingFn(index, point, errors[index]) } } )

LongParameterList:LoessFilter.kt$LoessFilter$( private val span: Float = 0.3f, private val robustnessIterations: Int = 2, private val accuracy: Float = 1e-12f, private val minimumSpanSize: Int = 0, private val maximumSpanSize: Int = Int.MAX_VALUE, private val maximumSpanDistance: Float? = null, private val distanceFn: (p1: List<Float>, p2: List<Float>) -> Float = Geometry::manhattanDistance )

MaxLineLength:ClearLaterPredictor.kt$ClearLaterPredictor$return (factors.weatherFront == WeatherFront.Cold && factors.pressureSystem != PressureSystem.Low) || (hasCurrentCloudConditions && factors.pressureSystem == PressureSystem.High && factors.pressureTendency.characteristic == PressureCharacteristic.Steady)
MaxLineLength:EastingNorthingConversion.kt$EastingNorthingConversion$check(delta <= 0.00001) { "Easting/northing to lat/lon conversion did not converge within $MAX_TO_LAT_LON_ITERATIONS iterations" }
MaxLineLength:EclipticObliquity.kt$EclipticObliquity$nutation += (row[7] + row[8] * T) * cosDegrees(row[0] * X0 + row[1] * X1 + row[2] * X2 + row[3] * X3 + row[4] * X4)

MaxLineLength:HighPressureLaterPredictor.kt$HighPressureLaterPredictor$return (factors.weatherFront == WeatherFront.Cold && factors.pressureSystem != PressureSystem.Low) || (factors.pressureSystem == PressureSystem.High && factors.pressureTendency.characteristic == PressureCharacteristic.Steady)
MaxLineLength:KoppenGeigerClimateClassifier.kt$KoppenGeigerClimateClassifier$require(Month.entries.all { precipitation.contains(it) }) { "A precipitation reading is required for each month" }

MaxLineLength:KoppenGeigerClimateClassifier.kt$KoppenGeigerClimateClassifier$require(precipitation.values.none { !it.value.isFinite() || it.value < 0 }) { "One or more precipitation readings are invalid" }

MaxLineLength:LongitudinalNutation.kt$LongitudinalNutation$nutation += (row[5] + row[6] * T) * sinDegrees(row[0] * X0 + row[1] * X1 + row[2] * X2 + row[3] * X3 + row[4] * X4)

MaxLineLength:LowPressureLaterPredictor.kt$LowPressureLaterPredictor$return (factors.weatherFront == WeatherFront.Warm && factors.pressureSystem != PressureSystem.High) || (factors.pressureSystem == PressureSystem.Low && factors.pressureTendency.characteristic == PressureCharacteristic.Steady)

MaxLineLength:Meteorology.kt$Meteorology$c1 + c2 * temperature + c3 * relativeHumidity + c4 * temperature * relativeHumidity + c5 * temperature * temperature + c6 * relativeHumidity * relativeHumidity + c7 * temperature * temperature * relativeHumidity + c8 * temperature * relativeHumidity * relativeHumidity + c9 * temperature * temperature * relativeHumidity * relativeHumidity
MaxLineLength:NeuralNetwork.kt$NeuralNetwork$"Input of dimension ${inputSize.second} can't be fed to network with input dimension of ${layers.first().inputSize}"
MaxLineLength:NeuralNetwork.kt$NeuralNetwork$"Output of dimension ${inputSize.second} can't be produced by network with output dimension of ${layers.last().outputSize}"
MaxLineLength:NeuralNetwork.kt$NeuralNetwork$throw Exception("Layer with output of ${it.first.outputSize} can't connect to layer with input of ${it.second.inputSize}")

MaxLineLength:NewtonsRiseSetTransitTimeCalculator.kt$NewtonsRiseSetTransitTimeCalculator$// Get today's times (at noon) - this is needed around DST changes in the UK (I'm not 100% sure why - seems to occur when getting the UT 0)
MaxLineLength:Optics.kt$Optics$1 / (cx2 * fy2 - 2 * cx * fy2 * point.x + cy2 * fx2 - 2 * cy * fx2 * point.y + fx2 * fy2 + fx2 * y2 + fy2 * x2)
MaxLineLength:Optics.kt$Optics$normalizedX * radialDistortion + (p1 * (rSquared + 2 * normalizedX * normalizedX) + 2 * p2 * normalizedX * normalizedY) * sharedTangentialDistortion
MaxLineLength:Optics.kt$Optics$normalizedY * radialDistortion + (2 * p1 * normalizedX * normalizedY + p2 * (rSquared + 2 * normalizedY * normalizedY)) * sharedTangentialDistortion

MaxLineLength:OvercastLaterPredictor.kt$OvercastLaterPredictor$return factors.weatherFront == WeatherFront.Warm && factors.pressureSystem != PressureSystem.High || (hasCurrentCloudConditions && factors.pressureSystem == PressureSystem.Low && factors.pressureTendency.characteristic == PressureCharacteristic.Steady)
MaxLineLength:SolarEclipseCalculator.kt$SolarEclipseCalculator$// The sun is larger than the moon, and the moon is completely contained in the sun disk (sun is partially obscured)

MaxLineLength:SphericalHarmonics.kt$/* * Copyright (C) 2009 The Android Open Source Project * * Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License"); * you may not use this file except in compliance with the License. * You may obtain a copy of the License at * * http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0 * * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS, * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied. * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and * limitations under the License. * * This file was heavily modified by Kyle Corry. MaxLineLength:SphericalHarmonics.kt$SphericalHarmonics$crossinline calculator: (yearsSinceBase: Float, legendre: LegendreTable, relativeRadiusPower: FloatArray, cosMLon: FloatArray, sinMLon: FloatArray, gdLatitudeRad: Float, mGcLatitudeRad: Float) -> T

MaxLineLength:SphericalHarmonics.kt$SphericalHarmonics$gcY += relativeRadiusPower[n + 2] * m * (g * sinMLon[m] - h * cosMLon[m]) * legendre.mP[n][m] * schmidtQuasiNormFactors[n][m] * inverseCosLatitude
MaxLineLength:Statistics.kt$Statistics$* Calculates the root mean square errors between the datasets. Actual and predicted must correspond 1-1 with eachother.
MaxLineLength:Statistics.kt$Statistics$* Calculates the sum of squared errors between the datasets. Actual and predicted must correspond 1-1 with eachother.
MaxLineLength:TemperatureTrigger.kt$TemperatureTrigger$private val triggerType: TemperatureTriggerType = if (above) TemperatureTriggerType.High else TemperatureTriggerType.Low
MaxLineLength:UTMCoordConverter.kt$UTMCoordConverter$// if ((Easting < MIN_EASTING) || (Easting > MAX_EASTING)) //removed check to enable reprojecting images

MaxLineLength:UTMCoordinateFormat.kt$UTMCoordinateFormat$if (coordinate.latitude < -72) 'C' else if (coordinate.latitude < -64) 'D' else if (coordinate.latitude < -56) 'E' else if (coordinate.latitude < -48) 'F' else if (coordinate.latitude < -40) 'G' else if (coordinate.latitude < -32) 'H' else if (coordinate.latitude < -24) 'J' else if (coordinate.latitude < -16) 'K' else if (coordinate.latitude < -8) 'L' else if (coordinate.latitude < 0) 'M' else if (coordinate.latitude < 8) 'N' else if (coordinate.latitude < 16) 'P' else if (coordinate.latitude < 24) 'Q' else if (coordinate.latitude < 32) 'R' else if (coordinate.latitude < 40) 'S' else if (coordinate.latitude < 48) 'T' else if (coordinate.latitude < 56) 'U' else if (coordinate.latitude < 64) 'V' else if (coordinate.latitude < 72) 'W' else 'X'

VariableNaming:LunarEclipseParameterProvider.kt$LunarEclipseParameterProvider$val M = Trigonometry.normalizeAngle( 2.5534 + 29.1053567 * k - 0.0000014 * power( T, 2 ) - 0.00000011 * power(T, 3) )

VariableNaming:LunarEclipseParameterProvider.kt$LunarEclipseParameterProvider$val MPrime = Trigonometry.normalizeAngle( 201.5643 + 385.81693528 * k + 0.0107582 * power(T, 2) + 0.00001238 * power( T, 3 ) - 0.000000058 * power(T, 4) )
VariableNaming:MGRSCoordConverter.kt$MGRSCoordConverter$private var ltr2_high_value: Long = 0 // this is only used for doing MGRS to xxx conversions.

VariableNaming:MGRSCoordConverter.kt$MGRSCoordConverter$val aa_pattern: Long = if (MGRS_Ellipsoid_Code.compareTo(CLARKE_1866) == 0 || MGRS_Ellipsoid_Code.compareTo(CLARKE_1880) == 0 || MGRS_Ellipsoid_Code.compareTo( BESSEL_1841 ) == 0 || MGRS_Ellipsoid_Code.compareTo(BESSEL_1841_NAMIBIA) == 0 ) 0L else 1L /* Pattern based on ellipsoid code */

VariableNaming:MGRSCoordConverter.kt$MGRSCoordConverter$val false_northing: Double /* False northing for 3rd letter */

VariableNaming:MGRSCoordConverter.kt$MGRSCoordConverter$val ltr3_high_value: Long /* 3rd letter range - high number (UPS) */

VariableNaming:MGRSCoordConverter.kt$MGRSCoordConverter$var grid_easting: Double /* Easting used to derive 2nd letter of MGRS */
VariableNaming:MGRSCoordConverter.kt$MGRSCoordConverter$var grid_easting: Double /* easting for 100,000 meter grid square */
VariableNaming:MGRSCoordConverter.kt$MGRSCoordConverter$var grid_northing: Double /* Northing for 100,000 meter grid square */
VariableNaming:MGRSCoordConverter.kt$MGRSCoordConverter$var grid_northing: Double /* Northing used to derive 3rd letter of MGRS */

VariableNaming:PolarCoordConverter.kt$PolarCoordConverter$/* Ellipsoid Parameters, default to WGS 84 */ private var Polar_a = 6378137.0 /* Semi-major axis of ellipsoid in meters */
VariableNaming:PolarCoordConverter.kt$PolarCoordConverter$/* Maximum variance for easting and northing values for WGS 84. */ private var Polar_Delta_Easting = 12713601.0
VariableNaming:PolarCoordConverter.kt$PolarCoordConverter$/* Polar Stereographic projection Parameters */ private var Polar_Origin_Lat: Double = ((PI * 90) / 180) /* Latitude of origin in radians */
VariableNaming:PolarCoordConverter.kt$PolarCoordConverter$private var Polar_False_Easting = 0.0 /* False easting in meters */
VariableNaming:PolarCoordConverter.kt$PolarCoordConverter$private var Polar_False_Northing = 0.0 /* False northing in meters */
VariableNaming:PolarCoordConverter.kt$PolarCoordConverter$private var Polar_Origin_Long = 0.0 /* Longitude of origin in radians */
VariableNaming:SolarEclipseParameterProvider.kt$SolarEclipseParameterProvider$val M = Trigonometry.normalizeAngle( 2.5534 + 29.1053567 * k - 0.0000014 * power( T, 2 ) - 0.00000011 * power(T, 3) )

VariableNaming:SolarEclipseParameterProvider.kt$SolarEclipseParameterProvider$val MPrime = Trigonometry.normalizeAngle( 201.5643 + 385.81693528 * k + 0.0107582 * power(T, 2) + 0.00001238 * power( T, 3 ) - 0.000000058 * power(T, 4) )
VariableNaming:StarLocator.kt$StarLocator$val B = cosDegrees(value3) * cosDegrees(declination) * cosDegrees(rightAscension + value1) - sinDegrees(value3) * sinDegrees( declination )
VariableNaming:StarLocator.kt$StarLocator$val C = sinDegrees(value3) * cosDegrees(declination) * cosDegrees(rightAscension + value1) + cosDegrees(value3) * sinDegrees( declination )
VariableNaming:TMCoordConverter.kt$TMCoordConverter$/* Isometeric to geodetic latitude parameters, default to WGS 84 */ private var TranMerc_ap = 6367449.1458008
VariableNaming:TMCoordConverter.kt$TMCoordConverter$/* Maximum variance for easting and northing values for WGS 84. */ private var TranMerc_Delta_Easting = 40000000.0
VariableNaming:TMCoordConverter.kt$TMCoordConverter$/* Transverse_Mercator projection Parameters */ private var TranMerc_Origin_Lat = 0.0 /* Latitude of origin in radians */
VariableNaming:TMCoordConverter.kt$TMCoordConverter$private var TranMerc_False_Easting = 0.0 /* False easting in meters */
VariableNaming:TMCoordConverter.kt$TMCoordConverter$private var TranMerc_False_Northing = 0.0 /* False northing in meters */
VariableNaming:TMCoordConverter.kt$TMCoordConverter$private var TranMerc_Origin_Long = 0.0 /* Longitude of origin in radians */
VariableNaming:TMCoordConverter.kt$TMCoordConverter$val TranMerc_b: Double /* Semi-minor axis of ellipsoid, in meters */
VariableNaming:UPSCoordConverter.kt$UPSCoordConverter$/* Ellipsoid Parameters, default to WGS 84 */ private val UPS_a = 6378137.0 /* Semi-major axis of ellipsoid in meters */
VariableNaming:UPSCoordConverter.kt$UPSCoordConverter$private var UPS_Origin_Latitude: Double = MAX_ORIGIN_LAT /*set default = North Hemisphere */
VariableNaming:UTMCoordConverter.kt$UTMCoordConverter$private var UTM_Override: Long = 0 /* Zone override flag */
VariableNaming:UTMCoordConverter.kt$UTMCoordConverter$private var UTM_a = 6378137.0 /* Semi-major axis of ellipsoid in meters */

VariableNaming:UTMCoordConverter.kt$UTMCoordConverter$val TM = TMCoord.fromLatLon( Angle.fromRadians(latitude), Angle.fromRadians(lon), this.UTM_a, this.UTM_f, Angle.fromRadians(originLatitude), Angle.fromRadians(this.centralMeridian), falseEasting, falseNorthing, scale )

VariableNaming:UTMCoordConverter.kt$UTMCoordConverter$val TM = TMCoord.fromTM( Easting, Northing, Angle.fromRadians(Origin_Latitude), Angle.fromRadians(this.centralMeridian), False_Easting, False_Northing, Scale )
VariableNaming:UniversalTime.kt$val D = dayOfMonth.toDouble() + if (includeTime) toLocalTime().toDecimalHours() / 24.0 else 0.0
